statement: In every magma, Equation 70 (`x = y * (x * (z * z))`) implies Equation 3052 (`x = (((x * x) * x) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0730
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op x (op z z)))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op x x) x) y) x)
